entities.name: David Adair Area 51 Engine Claim
entities.summary: David Adair's account of being taken to a classified Nevada facility and viewing an unusual propulsion system.

entities.name: April 5, 1966 House UFO Hearing
entities.summary: A House Armed Services hearing addressing unidentified flying objects and the Air Force investigation program during the period of the Michigan sightings.

entities.name: 1966 Minot Missile UFO Incident
entities.summary: David Schindele's account of a UFO-related event and missile shutdowns near Minot Air Force Base in 1966.

entities.name: July 29, 1968 House UFO Symposium
entities.summary: A congressional scientific symposium presenting testimony and prepared material on UFO reports, research methods, physical evidence, and possible explanations.

entities.name: 1977 Ellsworth Air Force Base UFO Incident
entities.summary: Mario Woods's account of a UFO encounter while serving as an Air Force security policeman near a missile facility.

entities.name: Bob Lazar's 1989 KLAS Interviews
entities.summary: Television interviews in which Bob Lazar publicly described alleged work at S-4 near Area 51.

entities.name: Jonathan Weygandt Peru Encounter Interview
entities.summary: Long-form interview in which Jonathan Weygandt described an alleged 1997 crash encounter in Peru.

entities.name: Alleged 1997 Peru Crash Encounter
entities.summary: Jonathan Weygandt's public account of encountering an unusual crashed object while deployed in Peru.

entities.name: 2003 Vandenberg UAP Incidents
entities.summary: Reported UAP events near Vandenberg Air Force Base described by former security personnel.

entities.name: 2004 Nimitz Encounter
entities.summary: November 2004 observations and sensor detections involving the USS Nimitz carrier strike group

entities.name: Alleged 2009 Indonesia Craft Encounter
entities.summary: Michael Herrera's public account of observing a large craft and unidentified personnel during a humanitarian deployment in Indonesia.

entities.name: 2014–2015 East Coast Navy Encounters
entities.summary: A series of recurring UAP observations reported by U.S. Navy aviators operating from the East Coast, including Ryan Graves and members of his squadron.

entities.name: The New York Times Publishes “Glowing Auras and ‘Black Money’”
entities.summary: The December 2017 New York Times investigation brought broad public attention to the Pentagon’s UAP program and the 2004 Nimitz encounter, including David Fravor’s account.

entities.name: Bob Lazar: Area 51 & Flying Saucers
entities.summary: 2018 documentary directed by Jeremy Corbell examining Bob Lazar’s claims about Area 51, S4, and alleged reverse-engineering work.

entities.name: The New York Times Publishes “‘Wow, What Is That?’”
entities.summary: The May 2019 New York Times report presented Ryan Graves’s account of recurring East Coast UAP encounters and framed them as an aviation-safety and national-security concern.

entities.name: David Fravor on the Lex Fridman Podcast
entities.summary: Long-form interview discussing Fravor and the Nimitz encounter

entities.name: May 3, 2022 Classified UAP Briefing
entities.summary: A classified congressional briefing held before the May 17, 2022 public hearing on unidentified aerial phenomena.

entities.name: May 17, 2022 House Intelligence UAP Hearing
entities.summary: An open hearing followed by a closed classified briefing on the Department of Defense and Intelligence Community response to unidentified aerial phenomena, including reporting, stigma, flight safety, national security, data collection, analysis, and the creation of AOIMSG.

entities.name: Official May 2022 Hearing Transcript
entities.summary: Official transcript of the May 17, 2022 House hearing

entities.name: April 19, 2023 Senate AARO Hearing
entities.summary: An open Senate hearing examining AARO's mission, activities, oversight, budget, reporting process, and analysis of UAP cases.

entities.name: NASA UAP Independent Study Public Meeting
entities.summary: NASA held a public meeting of its UAP Independent Study Team on May 31, 2023.

entities.name: Americans for Safe Aerospace Launches as a 501(c)(3)
entities.summary: Ryan Graves announced the launch of Americans for Safe Aerospace as a pilot-led nonprofit focused on UAP reporting, aviation safety, and transparency.

entities.name: July 13, 2023 UAP Disclosure Act Action
entities.summary: Congressional consideration of UAP disclosure provisions proposed for the Fiscal Year 2024 defense and intelligence authorization process.

entities.name: July 26, 2023 House UAP Hearing
entities.summary: A public House hearing examining military and commercial aviation encounters with unidentified anomalous phenomena, federal handling and classification of UAP information, whistleblower protections, public safety, national security, and congressional oversight.

entities.name: 2023 Classified AARO Briefings
entities.summary: An aggregate research record for publicly acknowledged classified AARO briefings to authorized congressional committees during 2023.

entities.name: David Grusch Written Testimony
entities.summary: Written statement submitted for the July 26, 2023 House hearing

entities.name: Official July 2023 Hearing Transcript
entities.summary: Official transcript of the July 26, 2023 House hearing

entities.name: NASA UAP Independent Study Team Report
entities.summary: Final report of NASA's UAP Independent Study Team, released in September 2023.

entities.name: David Grusch NewsNation Interview
entities.summary: Television interview in which Grusch publicly discussed allegations concerning hidden UAP-related programs

entities.name: WEAPONIZED Episode #21 — The David Grusch Revelations
entities.summary: Jeremy Corbell and George Knapp recount their early contact with David Grusch, his decision to come forward publicly, his whistleblower complaint, and reported retaliation connected to his UAP disclosures.

entities.name: WEAPONIZED Episode #28 — Congressional Hearing Roundtable
entities.summary: Jeremy Corbell and George Knapp are joined by Ross Coulthart and Bryce Zabel for a roundtable about the July 26, 2023 House UAP hearing, its three witnesses, how the hearing came together, and what might follow.

entities.name: January 12, 2024 House SCIF Briefing
entities.summary: A closed briefing concerning UAP whistleblower allegations and congressional access to information held by the intelligence community.

entities.name: Luis Elizondo Publishes Imminent
entities.summary: Luis Elizondo’s memoir Imminent: Inside the Pentagon’s Hunt for UFOs was published, presenting his account of government UAP investigation and his arguments for greater transparency and oversight.

entities.name: November 13, 2024 House UAP Hearing
entities.summary: A joint House Oversight hearing examining government transparency, alleged secret UAP programs, aviation and maritime safety, scientific study, whistleblower concerns, and congressional access to UAP information.

entities.name: November 19, 2024 Senate AARO Hearing
entities.summary: An open Senate hearing receiving an update on AARO's activities, priorities, case holdings, data collection, transparency, and unresolved reports.

entities.name: December 6, 2024 Classified AARO Briefing
entities.summary: A classified briefing involving AARO Director Jon Kosloski and House Oversight members following the November 2024 public hearings.

entities.name: December 18, 2024 FY2025 NDAA Action
entities.summary: A research record for UAP-related provisions and proposals considered during the Fiscal Year 2025 National Defense Authorization Act process.

entities.name: AFP Fact Check: Antarctic Research Facility Does Not Produce Energy Weapons
entities.summary: Fact-check article presenting scientific explanations and rebuttals concerning claims about IceCube and South Pole technology.

entities.name: Luis Elizondo Written Testimony
entities.summary: Written testimony submitted for the November 13, 2024 House UAP hearing.

entities.name: September 9, 2025 House UAP Hearing
entities.summary: A public hearing examining UAP disclosure, AARO and intelligence-community transparency, witness accounts, and protections for national-security whistleblowers.

entities.name: December 18, 2025 FY2026 NDAA Action
entities.summary: A research record for UAP-related provisions, reporting requirements, and oversight proposals considered during the Fiscal Year 2026 NDAA process.

entities.name: Dylan Borland Written Testimony
entities.summary: Written whistleblower statement submitted for the September 9, 2025 House hearing.

entities.name: Alexandro Wiggins on WEAPONIZED
entities.summary: Interview discussing Wiggins's account of a February 2023 USS Jackson UAP event.

entities.name: Alexandro Wiggins Written Statement
entities.summary: Written eyewitness statement submitted for the September 9, 2025 House hearing.

entities.name: March 31, 2026 Congressional Request for UAP Video Records
entities.summary: House Oversight letter requesting the production of 46 identified military UAP videos and related records.

entities.name: S4: The Bob Lazar Story
entities.summary: 2026 documentary centered on Bob Lazar’s account of the alleged S4 facility, including visual reconstructions developed from his recollections.

entities.name: WEAPONIZED Episode #115 — A New Chapter in the Bob Lazar Saga
entities.summary: Luigi Venditelli joins Jeremy Corbell and George Knapp to discuss S4: The Bob Lazar Story, its reconstruction of the alleged S4 facility, and the continuing debate surrounding Bob Lazar’s claims.

entities.summary: Department of Defense office responsible for receiving, analyzing, and resolving reports of unidentified anomalous phenomena across operational domains.

entities.summary: Designation publicly associated with a Pentagon effort examining military UAP reports and potential advanced aerospace threats.

entities.name: Advanced Aerospace Weapon System Applications Program
entities.summary: Defense Intelligence Agency program initiated to study advanced aerospace threats and anomalous phenomena through contracted research.

entities.name: Alexandro Wiggins
entities.summary: Active-duty U.S. Navy operations specialist

entities.summary: Emery Smith's public claims of participation in classified biological and medical examination programs involving alleged non-human material.

entities.name: Anna Paulina Luna
entities.summary: U.S. Representative from Florida

entities.name: Big Sur Missile Film Claim
entities.summary: A disputed account concerning film of a 1964 missile test and an alleged unidentified object.

entities.name: Bryce Zabel
entities.summary: Journalist, writer, producer, and Need to Know co-host who participated in the WEAPONIZED Episode #28 congressional-hearing roundtable.

entities.name: Carl Sagan

entities.name: Chad Underwood
entities.summary: Former U.S. Navy aviator who recorded the FLIR1 video during the 2004 Nimitz encounter.

entities.name: Charles Halt
entities.summary: Retired U.S. Air Force officer who investigated and documented part of the 1980 Rendlesham Forest incident.

entities.name: Chaz King
entities.summary: Former U.S. Air Force security personnel associated with publicly reported 2003 UAP incidents near Vandenberg Air Force Base.

entities.name: Christopher “Kit” Green
entities.summary: Physician and former CIA biomedical-intelligence official associated publicly with research into reported physiological effects of anomalous encounters.

entities.name: Christopher Mellon
entities.summary: Former Deputy Assistant Secretary of Defense for Intelligence and former Senate Intelligence Committee staff director who has advocated for congressional UAP oversight.

entities.name: Matthew Brown urges additional UAP insiders to come forward
entities.summary: Matthew Brown argues that additional insiders with relevant knowledge should use lawful reporting channels and, when necessary, speak publicly to advance oversight and transparency.

entities.name: Emery Smith Alien-Autopsy Program Claims
entities.summary: Claims that Emery Smith participated in classified medical examinations of alleged non-human biological material.

entities.name: David Adair Area 51 Engine Claim
entities.summary: Claim that Adair viewed an unusual or non-human propulsion system at a classified Nevada facility as a young rocketry prodigy.

entities.name: Clifford Stone Crash-Retrieval Team Claims
entities.summary: Claims that Clifford Stone participated in military operations involving recovered craft and non-human beings.

entities.name: David Grusch alleges that the United States has operated a crash-retrieval program
entities.summary: David Grusch has alleged that the United States has maintained a long-running program involving the retrieval and study of objects described as non-human or anomalous craft.

entities.name: Bob Lazar claims that Element 115 powered the Sport Model craft
entities.summary: Bob Lazar has claimed that a stable form of Element 115 served as part of the power and gravity-based propulsion system of the craft he called the Sport Model.

entities.name: Matthew Brown argues that excessive secrecy stifles public and congressional inquiry
entities.summary: Matthew Brown argues that excessive classification and compartmentalization prevent the public and Congress from conducting meaningful inquiry into UAP-related matters.

entities.name: Matthew Brown alleges that UAP information is deeply compartmentalized
entities.summary: Matthew Brown alleges that UAP-related information is routed through restricted channels and kept from much of the defense and intelligence community.

entities.name: Matthew Brown states that his attempts to report the matter through official channels were blocked
entities.summary: Matthew Brown states that he attempted to report what he had learned through official channels but encountered institutional barriers before going public.

entities.name: Matthew Brown states that he reviewed documents describing Immaculate Constellation
entities.summary: Matthew Brown states that documents he reviewed described an alleged compartmentalized UAP-related effort known as Immaculate Constellation.

entities.name: Matthew Brown states that classified systems contained visual evidence of varied UAP forms
entities.summary: Matthew Brown states that classified government systems contained imagery and records depicting multiple reported UAP shapes and forms.

entities.name: Michael Herrera Indonesia Craft Claim
entities.summary: Claim that Herrera observed a large advanced craft and unidentified personnel moving containers during a 2009 deployment in Indonesia.

entities.name: Alleged 2012 Langley Triangle Encounter
entities.summary: Dylan Borland's account of observing a large triangular object near Langley Air Force Base in 2012.

entities.name: Ryan Graves states that recurring UAP encounters created an aviation-safety concern
entities.summary: Ryan Graves has stated that military aviators encountered unidentified objects repeatedly and that the frequency and behavior of those objects presented an unresolved aviation-safety concern.

entities.name: David Fravor states that the Tic Tac displayed performance beyond known aircraft
entities.summary: David Fravor has stated that the object encountered during the 2004 Nimitz event demonstrated acceleration, maneuverability, and apparent flight characteristics beyond those of aircraft known to him.

entities.name: Jonathan Weygandt Peru Crash Claim
entities.summary: Claim that Weygandt encountered an unusual crashed craft during a 1997 U.S. Marine Corps deployment in Peru and was detained or threatened afterward.

entities.name: Philip Corso Roswell Technology-Transfer Claim
entities.summary: Claim that recovered Roswell material was transferred through military research channels and contributed to later technological developments.

entities.name: The filmmakers state that the S4 reconstruction is based on Bob Lazar’s recollections
entities.summary: The creators of S4: The Bob Lazar Story describe the production’s visual reconstruction of the alleged facility as being developed from Bob Lazar’s recollections and account.

entities.name: Bob Lazar claims that nine unconventional craft were stored at S4
entities.summary: Bob Lazar has claimed that nine unconventional craft were housed in hangars at the alleged S4 facility near Area 51.

entities.name: Bob Lazar claims he worked at S4 on reverse-engineering an unconventional craft
entities.summary: Bob Lazar has stated that he was assigned to an alleged facility called S4, where he worked on efforts to understand and reverse-engineer an unconventional craft.

entities.name: David Grusch alleges that secret UAP programs were withheld from congressional oversight
entities.summary: David Grusch has alleged that classified UAP-related programs existed outside effective congressional oversight and were not fully disclosed to authorized lawmakers.

entities.name: Eric Hecker South Pole Technology Claims
entities.summary: Claims that South Pole facilities and the IceCube installation possessed capabilities beyond their publicly stated scientific mission.

entities.name: Matthew Brown alleges that public perceptions of UAP information are deliberately managed
entities.summary: Matthew Brown alleges that fear, self-interest, and institutional resistance are used to shape or limit public understanding of UAP information.

entities.name: Alleged USS Jackson Transmedium UAP Event
entities.summary: Alexandro Wiggins's account of four Tic-Tac-like objects observed and detected near USS Jackson in February 2023.

entities.name: David Grusch alleges he experienced retaliation connected to his UAP disclosures
entities.summary: David Grusch has alleged that he experienced professional and personal retaliation after reporting UAP-related information through protected channels.

entities.name: Robert Jacobs
entities.summary: Former U.S. Air Force officer who has claimed that film of a 1964 missile test showed an unidentified object interacting with the test vehicle.

entities.name: Robert L. Hall
entities.summary: Sociologist

entities.name: Robert Salas
entities.summary: Former U.S. Air Force missile officer who has associated a 1967 missile shutdown with a reported UFO event.

entities.name: Ronald S. Moultrie
entities.summary: Former Under Secretary of Defense for Intelligence and Security

entities.name: Ross Coulthart
entities.summary: Australian investigative journalist and NewsNation correspondent whose interviews have become central records in modern UAP disclosure reporting.

entities.name: Roswell Incident
entities.summary: The 1947 recovery of debris near Roswell, New Mexico, and the later claims and disputes surrounding its origin.

entities.name: Ryan Graves
entities.summary: Former U.S. Navy F/A-18 pilot, aviation-safety advocate, and congressional witness.

entities.name: Ryan Weigelt
entities.summary: Former U.S. Navy helicopter crew member connected to post-event activity during the 2004 Nimitz encounter.

entities.name: Alleged S-4 Facility
entities.summary: Claimed installation near Area 51 described by Bob Lazar as a location for reverse-engineering non-human craft.

entities.name: Scientific Investigation
entities.summary: Scientific methods, data standards, and research approaches.

entities.name: Scott W. Bray
entities.summary: Former Deputy Director of Naval Intelligence

entities.name: Scott Kelly
entities.summary: Retired NASA astronaut and former U.S. Navy aviator who served on NASA's UAP Independent Study Team.

entities.name: Sean M. Kirkpatrick
entities.summary: Former Director of the All-domain Anomaly Resolution Office and government witness before Congress.

entities.name: Senate Committee on Armed Services
entities.summary: U.S. Senate committee responsible for defense oversight and legislation.

entities.name: Senate Select Committee on Intelligence
entities.summary: U.S. Senate committee responsible for intelligence-community oversight.

entities.name: Shelley Wright
entities.summary: Astronomer and instrumentation specialist who served on NASA's UAP Independent Study Team.

entities.name: Skinwalker Ranch
entities.summary: Utah property associated with long-running investigations and claims concerning anomalous phenomena.

entities.name: The Sol Foundation
entities.summary: Research institute and policy organization bringing together academic, government, and industry expertise to address scientific, policy, and social questions raised by UAP.

entities.name: Somewhere in the Skies
entities.summary: Ryan Sprague hosts a long-running podcast centered on UFO reports, witness experiences, investigations, researchers, and the cultural history of the phenomenon.

entities.name: South Pole Technology Claims
entities.summary: Eric Hecker's public allegations concerning advanced technology and alleged non-scientific uses of facilities at the South Pole.

entities.name: Steven Greer
entities.summary: Founder of the Disclosure Project and organizer of the influential 2001 National Press Club witness event.

entities.name: That UFO Podcast
entities.summary: Andy McGrillen presents UAP news, interviews, listener discussions, and deep dives into UFOs and connected phenomena.

entities.name: The Day After Roswell
entities.summary: 1997 book by Philip J. Corso and William J. Birnes presenting claims about recovered Roswell technology and military reverse engineering.

entities.name: Theories of Everything
entities.summary: Curt Jaimungal hosts technically detailed long-form conversations spanning theoretical physics, consciousness, artificial intelligence, philosophy, and UAP research.

entities.name: Tim Burchett
entities.summary: U.S. Representative from Tennessee

entities.name: Tim Gallaudet
entities.summary: Retired U.S. Navy rear admiral and former NOAA official who testified about aviation and maritime safety.

entities.name: Los Alamos Monitor Profiles Bob Lazar’s Jet Car
entities.summary: The Los Alamos Monitor published a feature about Bob Lazar’s jet-powered Honda and described him as a physicist at the Los Alamos Meson Physics Facility.

entities.name: Bob Lazar’s Alleged S4 Work Period
entities.summary: Bob Lazar states that he worked at an installation called S4 near Area 51 from late 1988 into 1989, helping analyze an unconventional craft. GreyAlien records this as an attributed claim, not an established fact.

entities.name: Bob Lazar Appears Anonymously as “Dennis” on KLAS-TV
entities.summary: KLAS-TV aired George Knapp’s first interview with Bob Lazar, who appeared in silhouette under the pseudonym “Dennis” while describing alleged work at S4.

entities.name: Bob Lazar Publicly Identifies Himself in KLAS-TV Interview
entities.summary: Bob Lazar appeared on KLAS-TV under his own name and face as George Knapp continued reporting on Lazar’s allegations about S4 and Area 51.

entities.name: Christopher Mellon Joins the To The Stars Academy Team
entities.summary: Christopher Mellon became part of the To The Stars Academy team as a former national-security official supporting public UAP research and government-engagement efforts.

entities.name: Luis Elizondo Leaves the Pentagon and Begins Public UAP Advocacy
entities.summary: In October 2017, Luis Elizondo resigned from his Defense Department position, citing the need for greater public exposure and government cooperation in the study of UAP, and subsequently became a prominent public advocate on the issue.

entities.name: Garry Nolan’s Genomic Study Resolves the Atacama Specimen
entities.summary: A Stanford-led genomic study involving Garry Nolan concluded that the unusual Atacama specimen was human and identified mutations associated with its skeletal abnormalities, directly addressing years of extraterrestrial speculation surrounding the remains.

entities.name: Bob Lazar: Area 51 & Flying Saucers Released
entities.summary: Jeremy Corbell’s documentary revisiting Bob Lazar’s story was released digitally, renewing public attention around Lazar, Area 51, and S4.

entities.name: David Grusch Serves in UAP-Related Intelligence Assignments
entities.summary: From 2019 through 2022, David Grusch served in intelligence roles that included representing the National Reconnaissance Office to the UAP Task Force and later co-leading UAP analysis at the National Geospatial-Intelligence Agency, according to his congressional statement.

entities.name: Congress Receives the Preliminary UAP Assessment After Oversight Advocacy
entities.summary: The Office of the Director of National Intelligence delivered its preliminary UAP assessment to Congress after years of outreach and advocacy by Christopher Mellon and others seeking formal government review.

entities.name: David Grusch Provides UAP Information to the DoD Inspector General
entities.summary: In July 2021, David Grusch says he confidentially provided classified UAP-related information to the Department of Defense Inspector General concerning alleged withholding of information from Congress.

entities.name: Avi Loeb Co-Founds the Galileo Project for Systematic UAP Research
entities.summary: Avi Loeb and Frank Laukien founded the Harvard-hosted Galileo Project to move research on UAP and possible extraterrestrial technological artifacts toward transparent, validated, instrument-based scientific study.

entities.name: The Galileo Project Names Luis Elizondo a Research Affiliate
entities.summary: The Galileo Project announced Luis Elizondo as a research affiliate to contribute experience in UAP investigation, site selection for UAP-Scope systems, and assessment of the societal implications of potential findings.

entities.name: Karl Nell Supports the UAP Task Force and Congressional UAP Legislation
entities.summary: During the closing period of his Army career, Karl Nell served as an Army director supporting the UAP Task Force and states that his work with Defense Department and congressional leaders contributed to UAP provisions in the 2022 and 2023 National Defense Authorization Acts.

entities.name: David Grusch Files a PPD-19 Whistleblower Complaint
entities.summary: On May 25, 2022, David Grusch and his attorneys filed an unclassified PPD-19 intelligence-community whistleblower complaint alleging retaliation and reprisal connected to his protected UAP disclosures.

entities.name: Sean Kirkpatrick Is Named the First Director of AARO
entities.summary: The Department of Defense announced the establishment of the All-domain Anomaly Resolution Office and named Sean M. Kirkpatrick as its first director, placing him at the center of the government’s formal UAP investigation and reporting structure.

entities.name: WEAPONIZED Launches with Jeremy Corbell and George Knapp
entities.summary: Jeremy Corbell and George Knapp launched WEAPONIZED as a recurring investigative podcast focused on UAP, documents, witnesses, and government transparency.

entities.name: Avi Loeb Leads the IM1 Interstellar Meteor Recovery Expedition
entities.summary: Avi Loeb served as chief scientist for a June 2023 expedition that surveyed the Pacific seafloor near the calculated path of IM1 and recovered hundreds of spherules for laboratory analysis. The work broadened the Galileo Project’s investigation of possible extraterrestrial technological artifacts beyond aerial observations.

entities.name: AARO Launches a Secure UAP Reporting Mechanism
entities.summary: AARO launched a secure reporting mechanism for current and former U.S. government personnel to report direct knowledge of UAP-related programs or activities, a significant expansion of the office’s information-gathering role under Sean Kirkpatrick.

entities.name: The Sol Foundation Holds Its Inaugural UAP Research and Policy Symposium
entities.summary: The Sol Foundation convened its inaugural symposium at Stanford University, bringing together researchers, former officials, and policy specialists for focused discussion of UAP science, government policy, and disclosure. Karl Nell and Avi Loeb were among the listed participants.

entities.name: Corbell and Knapp Publish the Jellyfish UAP Footage
entities.summary: Jeremy Corbell and George Knapp publicly released military-filmed footage described in their reporting as the Jellyfish UAP, expanding WEAPONIZED coverage of documented UAP cases.

entities.name: Karl Nell Presents a Controlled UAP Disclosure Framework at SALT
entities.summary: Karl Nell delivered the SALT iConnections presentation “The Real Black Swan Event: The Controlled Disclosure of UAP & Non-Human Intelligence,” bringing a senior military and aerospace perspective on UAP disclosure to a major public conference.

entities.name: The Sol Foundation Holds Its Second Annual UAP Symposium
entities.summary: The Sol Foundation convened its second annual symposium in San Francisco, featuring scientific, policy, philosophical, and government-focused sessions on UAP. Garry Nolan organized and spoke at the event, while Jacques Vallée participated in a plenary discussion.

entities.name: S4: The Bob Lazar Story Released Digitally
entities.summary: The documentary S4: The Bob Lazar Story was released digitally, presenting a new visual reconstruction of Lazar’s account of the alleged S4 facility.

entities.name: WEAPONIZED Episode #115 Revisits the Bob Lazar Story
entities.summary: WEAPONIZED published Episode #115, featuring Luigi Venditelli in a discussion with Jeremy Corbell and George Knapp about S4: The Bob Lazar Story and the continuing debate surrounding Lazar’s claims.

entities.name: To The Stars Academy of Arts & Science
entities.summary: Public-benefit corporation that brought together former government officials, researchers, and media projects focused on UAP and advanced aerospace topics.

entities.name: Travis Taylor
entities.summary: Aerospace engineer, author, television personality, and former chief scientist for the UAP Task Force.

entities.name: UAP Disclosure Act of 2023
entities.summary: Proposed legislation addressing government UAP records and disclosure processes

entities.name: UAP Disclosure Legislation
entities.summary: Legislative proposals addressing UAP records, disclosure, reporting, and oversight.

entities.name: UAP Reporting Systems
entities.summary: Processes for collecting, retaining, and analyzing UAP reports.

entities.name: UAP Research
entities.summary: Investigation and documentation of unidentified anomalous phenomena

entities.name: UAP Science Advisory Council
entities.summary: Independent scientific advisory group formed to provide evidence-based guidance on UAP data, research standards, and federal scientific priorities.

entities.name: Unidentified Aerial Phenomena Task Force
entities.summary: Department of Defense task force that preceded AARO.

entities.name: United States Air Force
entities.summary: Air service branch of the U.S. Armed Forces.

entities.name: United States Army
entities.summary: Land service branch of the U.S. Armed Forces.

entities.name: United States Marine Corps
entities.summary: Expeditionary service branch of the U.S. Armed Forces.

entities.name: United States Navy
entities.summary: Maritime service branch of the U.S. Armed Forces

entities.name: USS Princeton
entities.summary: Ticonderoga-class guided-missile cruiser involved in the 2004 Nimitz carrier-strike-group events.

entities.name: Vandenberg Space Force Base
entities.summary: U.S. military launch and test installation in California, formerly Vandenberg Air Force Base.

entities.name: Warren Randolph
entities.summary: Federal Aviation Administration specialist who served on NASA's UAP Independent Study Team.

entities.name: WEAPONIZED — Matthew Brown Part 1: Immaculate Constellation
entities.summary: Matthew Brown joins Jeremy Corbell and George Knapp for the first part of a discussion concerning his allegations about Immaculate Constellation, compartmentalized UAP programs, whistleblower risk, and congressional oversight.

entities.name: WEAPONIZED Episode #75 — Matthew Brown Part 2: Immaculate Constellation
entities.summary: In Part 2, Matthew Brown joins Jeremy Corbell and George Knapp to discuss documents he says he reviewed, the alleged scope and compartmentalization of Immaculate Constellation, and the reporting process he followed before identifying himself publicly.

entities.name: WEAPONIZED Episode #76 — Matthew Brown Part 3: Immaculate Constellation
entities.summary: In Part 3, Matthew Brown concludes his WEAPONIZED interview with Jeremy Corbell and George Knapp by discussing alleged UAP imagery found on classified systems, the management of public perception, excessive secrecy, congressional inquiry, and his call for additional insiders to come forward.

entities.name: WEAPONIZED
entities.summary: Investigative series in which Jeremy Corbell and George Knapp explore UAP, government secrecy, unusual events, documents, and firsthand testimony.

entities.name: Whistleblower Protection
entities.summary: Legal and procedural protections for people reporting government misconduct or withheld information.
